query:
UPDATE gallery_images SET image_url = CASE 
  WHEN id = 1 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1469854523086-cc02fe5d8800?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 2 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1488646953014-85cb44e25828?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 3 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 4 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 5 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1469854523086-cc02fe5d8800?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 6 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1488646953014-85cb44e25828?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 7 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 8 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 9 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1469854523086-cc02fe5d8800?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  WHEN id = 10 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1488646953014-85cb44e25828?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
  ELSE 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
END WHERE id <= 37;
command:

  WHEN id = 1 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1469854523086-cc02fe5d8800?w=900&h=600&fit=crop'
